# Chapter 10: Materials selection  (~100 pp)
- 10.1 The Ashby method introduced (15) · 10.2 Property charts (15) · 10.3 Performance indices (15) · 10.4 Constraints and objectives (12) · 10.5 Multi-objective trade-offs (15) · 10.6 Cost, manufacturability, availability, sustainability as constraints (15) · 10.7 Failure section: materials decisions made on price alone (13)

**Archetype**: optimisation, ethics. **Project**: select a material for a specific function; defend the choice with property charts. **Exercises**: 30.
